name: Benchmarking Agentic Newswriting via Journalistic Workflows

description: arXiv:2509.00446v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent advances in autonomous digital agents from industry (e.g., Manus AI and Gemini's research mode) highlight their potential for structured tasks through autonomous decision-making and task decomposition, but it remains unclear how well such systems support real-world information-intensive workflows.
